theme: 2026 H2 planning: Your company event window is closing

linkedin.text:
Companies don't lose their first-choice destination to budget. They lose it to a calendar.

If you're planning a Q3–Q4 2026 event, the timeline is already working against you:
→ European hotel availability starts closing 14–16 weeks out
→ Flights climb 20–35% after the 12-week mark
→ Local vendors get booked by other event companies weeks ahead

What our pipeline shows right now:
→ September in Athens: 70% of recommended hotels already have group blocks
→ October in Prague: two of the best castle venues gone
→ Rhodes late summer: limited catamaran capacity left

I've watched companies settle for their third-choice destination simply because they started a month too late. Since 2010 we've produced 200+ events in 120+ countries — and the best ones always start early.

📅 Book a free 30-minute planning call. You'll leave knowing what your budget buys, which dates are realistic, and your full timeline. No commitment.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership #EventPlanning
